errors.description: Generic authentication failure. Same response for unknown email, wrong password, disabled Identity, soft-deleted Identity, unverified email when required. Enumeration-safe by construction.
Session's Application scope doesn't match the current request's X-Application-Id. Fired by auth.enforce_session_scope middleware.
Not an error per se — the login flow returns 202 with MfaChallengeResult when MFA is enrolled. The SPA transitions to the challenge-verify screen with the challenge_id.
MFA code verification failed. Response includes attempts_remaining; caller can retry until auth.mfa.max_attempts_per_challenge.
The challenge_id no longer resolves (expired or already consumed). Caller must restart from /auth/login.
Refresh token unknown, expired, or revoked. Same message for all three cases (no info leak).

Refresh token was already consumed. This is a breach signal — the family is invalidated + every session for the User revoked. Response is deliberately opaque to the client (same shape as REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID) but the SERVER logs the reuse-detection at critical severity + fires RefreshTokenReuseDetected.
JWT signature invalid, expired, or malformed. Downstream services see this.
JWT is on the deny list. Distinct from JWT_INVALID because the signature verified — the caller was authorised, then explicitly revoked.
JWT's `app` claim doesn't match the receiving service's configured Application. This is a cross-Application forgery attempt — log with critical severity.
Reset token unknown, expired, or already consumed. Same error for all three (no info leak).
Verification token unknown or expired. Idempotent — already-consumed for already-verified Identity returns success.
Grant token unknown, expired, or already consumed. Same error for all three.
Grant was issued for a different target Application than the current request's X-Application-Id.
Caller lacks a User row on the requested target Application. SPA routes to the target Application's onboarding flow.
Session lookup by id refused — either the id doesn't exist OR the caller doesn't own the session.
DELETE /auth/sessions/{session} refuses to revoke the session that IS the current request's Sanctum PAT. Caller must use /auth/logout instead.
POST /platform/auth/impersonate/start refused without a --reason (auth.impersonation.require_reason=true).
Target tenant doesn't hold the `impersonation` entitlement. Refused.
No active signing key found for the requested Application. Ops alerted.
JwtSigner couldn't decrypt the signing key ciphertext (KMS unreachable). Ops alerted.
auth.cors_strict middleware refused. Origin not in the Application's whitelist.
Tenant has user.registration.requires_invitation=true; self-registration refused.
Applicant is a minor per CompliantAgePolicy AND requires guardian approval. Registration is queued pending parent-consent workflow (Wave 7 sports/athletes).
auth.rate_limit_login middleware refused. Retry-After header set.
